description_long: This is a large, multi-story residential house surrounded by a fenced yard with mature trees and landscaped greenery. The structure features a complex roofline with multiple gables and hips, and the exterior is primarily finished in brick with some lighter accent materials. There are several large windows, including bay windows and a prominent set of glass doors leading to a backyard area with a pool and patio. The property includes a driveway leading to a covered garage and a separate carport. The front entryway is marked by a small porch with steps, flanked by decorative columns and landscaping. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a stately yet inviting appearance.
description: A large, brick multi-story house with a complex roof, landscaped yard, pool, and attached garage. Features include bay windows, a prominent entry porch, and mature trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and side of the house, highlighting the main entry porch, driveway, garage, and lush landscaping with trees and a pool in the backyard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side elevation, focusing on the brick facade, fenced yard, and the pool area with surrounding greenery.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the formal front of the house, emphasizing the bay windows, main entryway, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the rear and opposite side, showing the backyard patio, pool, and additional garden space, as well as the rear facade with more windows.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of Traditional and Modern elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and large glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a small porch with steps, decorative columns, and a prominent front door framed by landscaping.
